framework.ui.tips_this_is_a_replacement_:
### Tips
* This is a replacement table for OCR recognition issues
* Double-click a cell to edit
* Fill the fields above and click Add to create a new replacement rule
* Wrong Text: OCR-recognized incorrect text. If missing, enable OCR result display in Settings
* Correct Text: expected in-game text
* To delete, select a row first and then click Delete

framework.ui.once_enabled_clicking_the_c: Once enabled, clicking the Close button will hide the program in the system tray instead of exiting the program.
framework.ui.choose_which_page_to_enter_: Choose which page to enter directly when starting the software
framework.ui.if_turned_on_each_time_the_: If turned on, each time the game version is updated, the coordinates corresponding to the physical activity and the link to the Ancathiya update reminder will be automatically updated.
framework.ui.detect_beta_version_updates: Detect beta version updates (official version users)
framework.ui.off_by_default_after_users_: Off by default. After users of the official version turn it on, they will detect both the official version and the test version at the same time; users of the test version will always detect both at the same time.
framework.ui.the_game_is_completely_invi: The game is completely invisible in the background
framework.ui.if_your_game_window_is_used: If your game window is used permanently, you can choose to save it, so that the running will match faster. If the window size changes frequently, uncheck it.
framework.ui.after_waking_up_ancaxia_it_: After waking up Ancaxia, it will automatically start running the daily routine. You must first check and configure the automatic opening of the game.
framework.ui.automatically_wake_up_ancas: Automatically wake up Ancasia when booting
framework.ui.whether_to_turn_on_physical: Whether to turn on physical recovery notifications
framework.ui.if_you_choose_to_enable_a_p: If you choose to enable a proxy, you need to fill in the proxy port. If you do not enable a proxy, leave it blank.
framework.ui.show_ocr_results_and_opencv: Show OCR results and OpenCV errors in logs for detailed diagnostics
framework.ui.used_for_troubleshooting_ca: Used for troubleshooting capture regions. Screenshots are saved in SaaAssistantAca/temp and should be deleted manually
framework.ui.opening_will_display_detail: Opening will display detailed information on simulated input operations such as mouse movements, clicks, key presses, etc. in the log.
